lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਿ ਕਬੀਰ ਗੁਰ ਭੇਟਿ ਮਹਾ ਸੁਖ ਭ੍ਰਮਤ ਰਹੇ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਨਾਨਾਂ ॥੪॥੨੩॥੭੪॥
lines.translit: keh kabeer gur bhett mahaa sukh bhramat rahe man maanaanaan |4|23|74|
lines.english: Says Kabeer, meeting the Guru, I have found absolute peace. My mind has ceased its wanderings; I am happy. ||4||23||74||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar sat naam karataa purakh gur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. Truth Is The Name. Creative Being Personified. By Guru's Grace:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਗਉੜੀ ਪੂਰਬੀ ਬਾਵਨ ਅਖਰੀ ਕਬੀਰ ਜੀਉ ਕੀ ॥
lines.translit: raag gaurree poorabee baavan akharee kabeer jeeo kee |
lines.english: Raag Gauree Poorbee, Baawan Akhree Of Kabeer Jee:

lines.gurmukhi: ਏ ਅਖਰ ਖਿਰਿ ਜਾਹਿਗੇ ਓਇ ਅਖਰ ਇਨ ਮਹਿ ਨਾਹਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: e akhar khir jaahige oe akhar in meh naeh |1|
lines.english: These letters shall perish; they cannot describe the Imperishable Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਵਨ ਅਛਰ ਲੋਕ ਤ੍ਰੈ ਸਭੁ ਕਛੁ ਇਨ ਹੀ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: baavan achhar lok trai sabh kachh in hee maeh |
lines.english: Through these fifty-two letters, the three worlds and all things are described.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਸ ਓਹੁ ਹੈ ਤਸ ਲਖੈ ਨ ਕੋਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jas ohu hai tas lakhai na koee |2|
lines.english: No one can know Him as He is. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹਾ ਬੋਲ ਤਹ ਅਛਰ ਆਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: jahaa bol teh achhar aavaa |
lines.english: Wherever there is speech, there are letters.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੋਲ ਅਬੋਲ ਮਧਿ ਹੈ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: bol abol madh hai soee |
lines.english: He is in both speech and silence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਅਬੋਲ ਤਹ ਮਨੁ ਨ ਰਹਾਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: jeh abol teh man na rahaavaa |
lines.english: Where there is no speech, there, the mind rests on nothing.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਟਕ ਬੀਜ ਮਹਿ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਓ ਜਾ ਕੋ ਤੀਨਿ ਲੋਕ ਬਿਸਥਾਰ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: battak beej meh rav rahio jaa ko teen lok bisathaar |3|
lines.english: He is contained in the seed of the banyan-tree, and yet, His expanse spreads across the three worlds. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਲਹ ਲਹਉ ਤਉ ਕਿਆ ਕਹਉ ਕਹਉ ਤ ਕੋ ਉਪਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: alah lhau tau kiaa khau khau ta ko upakaar |
lines.english: If I come to know the Lord, what can I say; what good does it do to speak?

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਲਹ ਲਹੰਤਾ ਭੇਦ ਛੈ ਕਛੁ ਕਛੁ ਪਾਇਓ ਭੇਦ ॥
lines.translit: alah lahantaa bhed chhai kachh kachh paaeo bhed |
lines.english: One who knows the Lord understands His mystery, and bit by bit, the mystery disappears.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਲਟਿ ਭੇਦ ਮਨੁ ਬੇਧਿਓ ਪਾਇਓ ਅਭੰਗ ਅਛੇਦ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: aulatt bhed man bedhio paaeo abhang achhed |4|
lines.english: Turning away from the world, one's mind is pierced through with this mystery, and one obtains the Indestructible, Impenetrable Lord. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਰਕ ਤਰੀਕਤਿ ਜਾਨੀਐ ਹਿੰਦੂ ਬੇਦ ਪੁਰਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: turak tareekat jaaneeai hindoo bed puraan |
lines.english: The Muslim knows the Muslim way of life; the Hindu knows the Vedas and Puraanas.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਸਮਝਾਵਨ ਕਾਰਨੇ ਕਛੂਅਕ ਪੜੀਐ ਗਿਆਨ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: man samajhaavan kaarane kachhooak parreeai giaan |5|
lines.english: To instruct their minds, people ought to study some sort of spiritual wisdom. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਅੰਕਾਰ ਲਖੈ ਜਉ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: oankaar lakhai jau koee |
lines.english: If someone knows the One, the Universal Creator,

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਅੰਕਾਰ ਆਦਿ ਮੈ ਜਾਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: oankaar aad mai jaanaa |
lines.english: I know only the One, the Universal Creator, the Primal Being.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਿਖਿ ਅਰੁ ਮੇਟੈ ਤਾਹਿ ਨ ਮਾਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: likh ar mettai taeh na maanaa |
lines.english: I do not believe in anyone whom the Lord writes and erases.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਸਿ ਬਿਗਾਸ ਸੰਪਟ ਨਹੀ ਆਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: sas bigaas sanpatt nahee aavaa |
lines.english: the moon-light of Maya cannot enter the basket of the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਕਾ ਕਿਰਣਿ ਕਮਲ ਮਹਿ ਪਾਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: kakaa kiran kamal meh paavaa |
lines.english: KAKKA: When the rays of Divine Light come into the heart-lotus,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਈ ਲਖਿ ਮੇਟਣਾ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: soee lakh mettanaa na hoee |6|
lines.english: he shall not perish, since he knows Him. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਕਹ ਕਹਾ ਕਹਿ ਕਾ ਸਮਝਾਵਾ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: akah kahaa keh kaa samajhaavaa |7|
lines.english: he cannot describe the indescribable; he could speak, but who would understand? ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੋੜੇ ਛਾਡਿ ਨ ਦਹ ਦਿਸ ਧਾਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: khorre chhaadd na deh dis dhaavaa |
lines.english: It does not leave this cave to wander in the ten directions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਖਾ ਇਹੈ ਖੋੜਿ ਮਨ ਆਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: khakhaa ihai khorr man aavaa |
lines.english: KHAKHA: The mind has entered this cave.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਰੁ ਜੇ ਤਹਾ ਕੁਸਮ ਰਸੁ ਪਾਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: ar je tahaa kusam ras paavaa |
lines.english: And if one obtains the subtle fragrance of that spiritual flower,

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਗਾ ਗੁਰ ਕੇ ਬਚਨ ਪਛਾਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: gagaa gur ke bachan pachhaanaa |
lines.english: GAGGA: One who understands the Guru's Word

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਉ ਹੋਇ ਨਿਖਿਅਉ ਅਖੈ ਪਦੁ ਲਹੈ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: tau hoe nikhiaau akhai pad lahai |8|
lines.english: then, they become immortal, and attain the state of eternal dignity. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਸਮਹਿ ਜਾਣਿ ਖਿਮਾ ਕਰਿ ਰਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: khasameh jaan khimaa kar rahai |
lines.english: Knowing their Lord and Master, people show compassion;

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਹ ਗਹੈ ਗਹਿ ਗਗਨ ਰਹਾਈ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: agah gahai geh gagan rahaaee |9|
lines.english: when he grasps the Ungraspable Lord and dwells in the sky of the Tenth Gate. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜੀ ਬਾਤ ਨ ਧਰਈ ਕਾਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: doojee baat na dharee kaanaa |
lines.english: does not listen to anything else.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਹੈ ਬਿਹੰਗਮ ਕਤਹਿ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: rahai bihangam kateh na jaaee |
lines.english: He remains like a hermit and does not go anywhere,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਘਟ ਮਾਹਿ ਘਾਟ ਜਉ ਪਾਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: taa ghatt maeh ghaatt jau paavaa |
lines.english: When someone finds the Path to the Lord within his own heart,

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟ ਫੂਟੇ ਘਟਿ ਕਬਹਿ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: ghatt footte ghatt kabeh na hoee |
lines.english: Even when the body-pitcher bursts, he does not diminish.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਘਾ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਨਿਮਸੈ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: ghaghaa ghatt ghatt nimasai soee |
lines.english: GHAGHA: He dwells in each and every heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਙੰਙਾ ਨਿਗ੍ਰਹਿ ਸਨੇਹੁ ਕਰਿ ਨਿਰਵਾਰੋ ਸੰਦੇਹ ॥
lines.translit: ngangaa nigreh sanehu kar niravaaro sandeh |
lines.english: NGANGA: Restrain yourself, love the Lord, and dismiss your doubts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਹੀ ਦੇਖਿ ਨ ਭਾਜੀਐ ਪਰਮ ਸਿਆਨਪ ਏਹ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: naahee dekh na bhaajeeai param siaanap eh |11|
lines.english: Even if you do not see the Path, do not run away; this is the highest wisdom. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਘਟੁ ਛਾਡਿ ਅਵਘਟ ਕਤ ਧਾਵਾ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: so ghatt chhaadd avaghatt kat dhaavaa |10|
lines.english: why should he abandon that Path to follow some other path? ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਜਿ ਚਿਤ੍ਰੈ ਚੇਤਹੁ ਚਿਤਕਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: taj chitrai chetahu chitakaaree |
lines.english: Forget this picture, and remember the Painter.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਚਾ ਰਚਿਤ ਚਿਤ੍ਰ ਹੈ ਭਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: chachaa rachit chitr hai bhaaree |
lines.english: CHACHA: He painted the great picture of the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਜਿ ਚਿਤ੍ਰੈ ਚਿਤੁ ਰਾਖਿ ਚਿਤੇਰਾ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: taj chitrai chit raakh chiteraa |12|
lines.english: Forget this picture and focus your consciousness on the Painter. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਿਤ੍ਰ ਬਚਿਤ੍ਰ ਇਹੈ ਅਵਝੇਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: chitr bachitr ihai avajheraa |
lines.english: This wondrous painting is now the problem.

lines.gurmukhi: ਛਕਿ ਕਿ ਨ ਰਹਹੁ ਛਾਡਿ ਕਿ ਨ ਆਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: chhak ki na rahahu chhaadd ki na aasaa |
lines.english: Why are you so unhappy? Why don't you abandon your desires?

lines.gurmukhi: ਛਛਾ ਇਹੈ ਛਤ੍ਰਪਤਿ ਪਾਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: chhachhaa ihai chhatrapat paasaa |
lines.english: CHHACHHA: The Sovereign Lord of the Universe is here with you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੇ ਮਨ ਮੈ ਤਉ ਛਿਨ ਛਿਨ ਸਮਝਾਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: re man mai tau chhin chhin samajhaavaa |
lines.english: O my mind, each and every moment I try to instruct you,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਜਾ ਜਉ ਤਨ ਜੀਵਤ ਜਰਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: jajaa jau tan jeevat jaraavai |
lines.english: JAJJA: If someone burns his body while he is still alive,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾਹਿ ਛਾਡਿ ਕਤ ਆਪੁ ਬਧਾਵਾ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: taeh chhaadd kat aap badhaavaa |13|
lines.english: but you forsake Him, and entangle yourself with others. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਬਨ ਜਾਰਿ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਸੋ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: joban jaar jugat so paavai |
lines.english: and burns away the desires of his youth, then he finds the right way.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਬ ਜਾਇ ਜੋਤਿ ਉਜਾਰਉ ਲਹੈ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: tab jaae jot ujaarau lahai |14|
lines.english: then he finds the Divine Light. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਸ ਜਰਿ ਪਰ ਜਰਿ ਜਰਿ ਜਬ ਰਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: as jar par jar jar jab rahai |
lines.english: When he burns his desire for his own wealth, and that of others,
